issue_resolutions.issue: total_estimated_time ('~45-55 hours of concentrated learning/building') does not match the sum of the 4 non-mentoring competency plans' own estimated_time fields, which total 30-44 hours.
issue_resolutions.evidence: post_critic_fixes_applied[0] directly matches this issue: total_estimated_time was recomputed to 30-44 hours, the actual sum of the 4 competency plans' own estimated_time fields, and the corrected JSON was re-validated against LearningCertificationOutput's schema.

preserved_limitations: Critic review had access to full structured JSON for all 15 agents, not just prose summaries; review depth would be lower if only summaries were available (Critic Agent, agent 17).

Critic's review is a single pass; it did not re-run any upstream agent or independently re-search facts outside what agents themselves cited (e.g. Razorpay compensation data) — it verified internal consistency, not ground truth outside the system (Critic Agent, agent 17).
10-dimension scoring per agent involves judgment calls; a different reviewer could land on adjacent but not identical scores (Critic Agent, agent 17).
The Final Report synthesizes upstream agents' findings without independently re-verifying them; an error in an upstream agent's analysis would carry through unchanged (Final Report Agent, agent 15).

final_readiness_dashboard's 'good' overall status refers to readiness to apply, not to interview outcome or offer likelihood, which depend on factors outside this system's visibility (Final Report Agent, agent 15).

The Planner's time/complexity estimate assumed agents within a parallel group could run concurrently; this session's actual wall-clock time was not independently measured against that assumption (Planner Agent, agent 16).
next_actions: Optional polish, non-blocking: add an 'estimate_as_of_date' companion field to Resume Analysis's total_years_experience_estimate so the 'Present'-resolves-to-analysis-date assumption travels with the number itself, per Critic's suggestion on resume_analysis.
Optional polish, non-blocking: tighten JD Intelligence's hiring_priorities so it adds distinct synthesis rather than restating requirements in near-identical language, per Critic's suggestion.

Optional review, non-blocking: confirm with the candidate whether they were sole/primary owner of the Swiggy partner-rating initiative before using Resume Rewrite's Startup-version verb 'Owned' in an actual interview, per Critic's minor-severity note.

Optional polish, non-blocking: widen Portfolio Recommendation's build-time estimates or caveat them as assuming dedicated weekend time, since a full-time candidate may need longer, per Critic's suggestion.

Optional presentation nuance, non-blocking: in the Final Report's readiness dashboard, keep the banner text calling out the mentoring/role-fit/placeholder warnings visually adjacent to the top-line 'good' status badge, per Critic's suggestion on final_report.
human_readable_summary:
## Supervisor Verdict: Senior PM — Risk & Fraud @ Razorpay

**Session status: complete. Quality gate: passed with notes. Deliverable ready: yes.**

All 15 planned agents ran exactly as Planner Agent's execution plan specified — zero
discrepancies between planned and actual execution. The one Major issue Critic Agent
found (Learning & Certification's `total_estimated_time` not matching the sum of its own
competency-plan estimates) has been fixed and independently cross-checked against the
fix description: the corrected figure (30-44 hours) now matches the line items, and the
patched JSON re-validates against its schema.

No unresolved major or critical issues remain. Five suggestion/minor-level notes from
Critic's review are still open (no factual problems — presentation and word-choice nits),
which is why the gate is "passed with notes" rather than a clean "passed." None of them
block delivery.

Every limitation and insufficient-evidence flag raised by Critic Agent, Final Report
Agent, and Planner Agent has been carried forward unchanged below — this verdict adds no
new confidence beyond what those agents actually established.
